mcp_tools.description_model: Deterministic SCIENTIA discovery scan — rank publication_manifests rows by structured scientia_evidence signals (no LLM).
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Discovery Scan

mcp_tools.description_model: List external_submission_jobs in terminal failed status (not scheduled for retry), newest first.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication External Jobs Dead Letter

mcp_tools.description_model: List external_submission_jobs rows due for retry (queued, or retryable_failed with elapsed next_retry_at_ms) up to an optional limit.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication External Jobs Due

mcp_tools.description_model: Requeue one dead-letter scholarly job (status failed → queued) by external_submission_jobs.id for the next publication_external_jobs_tick.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication External Jobs Replay

mcp_tools.description_model: Process one or more batches of due scholarly submit jobs (preflight dual-approval + digest match, lease row, submit using stored adapter). Optional lock_ttl_ms, lock_owner, iterations, interval_secs, max_runtime_secs, and jitter_secs between ticks.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication External Jobs Tick

mcp_tools.description_model: Read-only JSON rollup of scholarly external_submission_jobs (queue snapshot, in-window status view, percentiles, per-adapter terminal/retry ratios), attempts, snapshots, scholarly_submissions (incl. in-window view), and publication_attempts by channel. metrics_schema_version 2. Optional since_hours (default 168).
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication External Pipeline Metrics

mcp_tools.description_model: Delete one publication media asset by publication_id + asset_ref.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Media Delete

mcp_tools.description_model: List publication media assets for a scientia publication id.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Media List

mcp_tools.description_model: Insert/update one publication media asset row for a scientia publication id.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Media Upsert

mcp_tools.description_model: CLI `vox scientia publication-novelty-fetch`; MCP `vox_scientia_publication_novelty_fetch`.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Novelty Fetch

mcp_tools.description_model: CLI `vox scientia publication-novelty-happy-path`; MCP `vox_scientia_publication_novelty_happy_path`.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Novelty Happy Path

mcp_tools.description_model: Run publication_preflight checks on a stored scientia manifest; returns readiness_score and findings JSON (no writes). Optional with_worthiness adds heuristic worthiness rubric output from the repo default YAML.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Preflight

mcp_tools.description_model: Create/update a canonical scientia publication manifest and return its content digest. Optional scholarly_metadata (ScientificPublicationMetadata) is merged under metadata_json.scientific_publication.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Prepare

mcp_tools.description_model: Publish a prepared publication id to selected channels (dry-run by default) and record publication_attempts. Live publish requires digest dual-approval, armed (orchestrator [news].publish_armed and/or VOX_NEWS_PUBLISH_ARMED), and respects orchestrator [news].dry_run merged with tool dry_run. Optional json=true returns a single-line compact JSON tool envelope.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Publish

mcp_tools.description_model: Retry failed channels from the most recent publication attempt, optionally scoped to one channel. Optional json=true returns a single-line compact JSON tool envelope.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Retry Failed

mcp_tools.description_model: Simulate per-channel routing outcomes for a prepared publication id (policy + topic filters + template derivation).
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Route Simulate

mcp_tools.description_model: Run scholarly pipeline on a stored manifest: preflight, dual-approval gate, optional venue staging export (output_dir + venue), then scholarly submit (unless dry_run). Optional json_compact returns a single-line JSON payload inside the tool result envelope (matches CLI --json).
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Scholarly Pipeline Run

mcp_tools.description_model: Poll remote scholarly repository status for the latest stored submission (or a specific external_submission_id) using the adapter recorded in VoxDb.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Scholarly Remote Status

mcp_tools.description_model: Poll remote scholarly status for every scholarly_submissions row on a publication (multi-deposit / multi-adapter); persists snapshots and best-effort continues per row.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Scholarly Remote Status Sync All

mcp_tools.description_model: Batch remote status poll: run sync-all logic for up to N publications ranked by recent scholarly_submissions activity (cron-friendly). Optional iterations, interval_secs, max_runtime_secs, and jitter_secs run repeated batches for a supervised worker.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Scholarly Remote Status Sync Batch

mcp_tools.description_model: Load a stored scientia publication manifest from VoxDb and write venue-scoped scholarly staging files (body.md, CITATION.cff, crossref_work.json, optional citations.json; zenodo.json for Zenodo; arxiv_handoff.json plus arxiv_bundle.tar.gz for arxiv-assist) under output_dir, then validate the tree.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Scholarly Staging Export

mcp_tools.description_model: Return manifest state, digest-bound approval count, discovery rank, manifest completion, transform preview stub, destination_readiness inside preflight, and scholarly submission rows.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Status

mcp_tools.description_model: Submit an approved scientia publication through the scholarly adapter (optional adapter arg or VOX_SCHOLARLY_ADAPTER; default local_ledger), with external_submission_jobs ledger updates.
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Publication Submit Local

mcp_tools.description_model: Evaluate publication-worthiness.contract YAML (repo-relative or default) against WorthinessInputs metrics JSON; returns Publish / AskForEvidence / Abstain decision (no writes).
mcp_tools.title: Scientia Worthiness Evaluate

mcp_tools.description_model: Tick lifecycle and remove archived sessions.
mcp_tools.title: Session Cleanup

mcp_tools.description_model: Replace a session's history with a summary string.
mcp_tools.title: Session Compact

mcp_tools.description_model: Create a new persistent session for an agent.
mcp_tools.title: Session Create

mcp_tools.description_model: Get detailed info about a specific session.
mcp_tools.title: Session Info

mcp_tools.description_model: List all active sessions with state and token usage.
mcp_tools.title: Session List

mcp_tools.description_model: Reset a session's conversation history (keeps metadata).
mcp_tools.title: Session Reset

mcp_tools.description_model: Set sticky MCP chat model id for chat / inline / ghost (empty string clears).
mcp_tools.title: Set Active Model

mcp_tools.description_model: Set custom VoxDB-powered budget limits for an agent.
mcp_tools.title: Set Agent Budget

mcp_tools.description_model: Set a key-value pair in the shared orchestrator context store. Supports TTL.
mcp_tools.title: Set Context

mcp_tools.description_model: Set per-agent model override in the orchestrator registry.
mcp_tools.title: Set Model

mcp_tools.description_model: Get detailed info on a specific skill by ID.
mcp_tools.title: Skill Info

mcp_tools.description_model: Install a skill from a VoxSkillBundle JSON payload.
mcp_tools.title: Skill Install

mcp_tools.description_model: List all installed skills.
mcp_tools.title: Skill List

mcp_tools.description_model: Parse a SKILL.md and preview its manifest before installing.
mcp_tools.title: Skill Parse

mcp_tools.description_model: Search installed skills by keyword.
mcp_tools.title: Skill Search

mcp_tools.description_model: Uninstall an installed skill by ID.
mcp_tools.title: Skill Uninstall

mcp_tools.description_model: Show the file-level diff between two snapshots.
mcp_tools.title: Snapshot Diff

mcp_tools.description_model: List recent file snapshots for an agent.
mcp_tools.title: Snapshot List

mcp_tools.description_model: Restore files to a previous snapshot state.
mcp_tools.title: Snapshot Restore

mcp_tools.description_model: Spawn a new orchestrator agent queue (optional dynamic/transient agent for auto-retire).
mcp_tools.title: Spawn Agent

mcp_tools.description_model: Orchestrated speech-to-code: transcribe workspace audio (Oratio) or accept prompt text, then vox_generate_code with shared session_id; optional route_mode, emit_trace_path JSONL for MENS.
mcp_tools.title: Speech To Code

mcp_tools.description_model: Submit a new task to the orchestrator. Routes to the best agent by file affinity.
mcp_tools.title: Submit Task

mcp_tools.description_model: Suggest the best model for a task category string (codegen, review, etc.).
mcp_tools.title: Suggest Model

mcp_tools.description_model: Get the current status of a specific task by ID.
mcp_tools.title: Task Status

mcp_tools.description_model: Run cargo test for the entire workspace.
mcp_tools.title: Test All

mcp_tools.description_model: Get the Testing Decision Engine's requirement classification (Required/Recommended/Deferred/Skip) for a task by ID.
mcp_tools.title: Test Decision

mcp_tools.description_model: Record or update TOESTUB anti-pattern findings from external reviews (GitHub/CodeRabbit).
mcp_tools.title: Toestub Findings Upsert

mcp_tools.description_model: Transfer ownership of a file to another agent.
mcp_tools.title: Transfer File

mcp_tools.description_model: Overrides the trust tier for the agent context.
mcp_tools.title: Trust Override

mcp_tools.description_model: Undo the last operation or a specific operation by ID.
mcp_tools.title: Undo

mcp_tools.description_model: Validate a .vox file using the full compiler pipeline (lexer → parser → typeck → HIR).
mcp_tools.title: Validate File

mcp_tools.description_model: Validate Vox source code passed as a string (no filesystem read). Returns LSP-style diagnostics with stable codes and structured autofix suggestions for the iterative AI-assistant repair loop.
mcp_tools.title: Validate Source

mcp_tools.description_model: Get unified VCS status.
mcp_tools.title: Vcs Status

mcp_tools.description_model: Dispatches a multi-modal visual RAG query to the configured intelligence backend.
mcp_tools.title: Visual Rag Query

mcp_tools.description_model: Performs an automated GUI visual audit (screenshot, AXTree, overlaps).
mcp_tools.title: Visus Audit

mcp_tools.description_model: Manages golden visual baselines for regression testing.
mcp_tools.title: Visus Baseline

mcp_tools.description_model: Create an isolated workspace for an agent.
mcp_tools.title: Workspace Create

mcp_tools.description_model: Merge an agent's workspace changes back to main.
mcp_tools.title: Workspace Merge

mcp_tools.description_model: Returns a list of all .vox files in the workspace repository.
mcp_tools.title: Workspace Modules

mcp_tools.description_model: Show files modified in an agent's workspace.
mcp_tools.title: Workspace Status
